title: Shopping & Bargaining
description: Ask prices, bargain politely in markets, and complete a purchase in Hindi.
situation: Markets and shops: prices, sizes, colours, friendly bargaining, and paying.

phrases.tip: A polite opening line when you want to bargain.
The standard polite way to ask for a discount.

phrases.native: क्या आपके पास और रंग हैं?
phrases.transliteration: kya aapke paas aur rang hain?
phrases.pronunciation: kyaa AAP-keh paas aur rung hain

phrases.english: Is this in a larger size?

phrases.tip: A woman says dekh rahi hoon. Useful to browse without pressure.

phrases.native: ठीक है, मैं यह ले लूँगा
phrases.transliteration: theek hai, main yeh le loonga
phrases.pronunciation: theek hai main yeh leh LOON-gaa

phrases.native: क्या आप ऑनलाइन पैसे लेते हैं?
phrases.transliteration: kya aap online paise lete hain?
phrases.pronunciation: kyaa aap online PAI-seh LEH-teh hain
phrases.tip: UPI apps like PhonePe and Google Pay are everywhere in India.
